title: Method and device for processing color image data representing colors of a color gamut
abstract: The present principles proposes an inverse gamut mapper that combines the following advantages â¢ invertibility. Essential to recover the original full gamut content â¢ low complexity of the inverse-color mapping. This ensures easy implementation on receiving devices. Â· invariance of colors near the white point. This preserves colors with memory (skin tone, etc.) â¢ minimal derivative of the color mapping. The local expansion of colors is bounded in order to control at best the error of color coding that becomes more noticeable after gamut expansion.
